# System Map — Firewolf

*Generated by Phase 1 Audit, updated Phase 4 — 2026-04-29*

## Module Dependency Graph

```
index.html
  ├── WASM Module (C++ → Emscripten)
  │   ├── g_rPlayers (Float32Array via HEAPF32)
  │   ├── g_rProjectiles
  │   ├── g_rParticles
  │   ├── g_rFlags
  │   ├── g_rBuildings
  │   └── heightmap data
  │
  ├── renderer.js (ES module, default export: start())
  │   ├── THREE + 7 addons
  │   ├── renderer_polish.js → Polish.*
  │   ├── renderer_sky_custom.js → initCustomSky, updateCustomSky, removeOldSky
  │   ├── renderer_characters.js?v=149 → Characters.init, Characters.sync
  │   └── renderer_combat_fx.js (dynamic import) → window.CombatFX
  │
  ├── renderer_rapier.js (IIFE → window.RapierPhysics)
  │
  ├── renderer_buildings.js (ES module — separate from buildings code in renderer.js)
  │
  ├── Toonify (IIFE → window.Toonify)
  ├── Cohesion (IIFE → window.Cohesion)
  ├── ZoomFX (IIFE → window.ZoomFX)
  ├── CommandMap (IIFE → window.CommandMap)
  ├── Minimap (IIFE → window.Minimap)
  │
  └── client/
      ├── network.js (voice, multiplayer)
      ├── tiers.js (rating system)
      └── settings.js (window.ST)
```

## window.* Global Inventory

### WRITES (renderer.js → window)

| Global | Written at | Type | Purpose | Readers |
|--------|-----------|------|---------|---------|
| `window._sampleTerrainH` | L100 | Function | Terrain height query at (worldX, worldZ) | renderer_characters.js, any module needing ground height |
| `window.DayNight` | L521 | Object | Day/night cycle: `.update()`, `.dayMix`, `.sunDir`, `._apply(t01)` | renderer_sky_custom.js, index.html (HUD clock) |
| `window.scene` | L326 | THREE.Scene | Three.js scene (debug only) | Debug tools, console |
| `window.camera` | L326 | THREE.PerspectiveCamera | Three.js camera (debug only) | Debug tools, console |
| `window.renderer` | L326 | THREE.WebGLRenderer | Three.js renderer (debug only) | Debug tools, console |
| `window._tribesDebug` | L328 | Object | Debug panel: scene, camera, renderer, composer, setComposerEnabled | index.html debug UI |
| `window.__tribesPolish` | L247 | Object | Polish module handle | Other modules needing shockwave/chimney |
| `window.__tribesApplyQuality` | L284 | Function | Quality tier change callback | index.html settings menu |
| `window.__tribesSetTerrainPBR` | L1131 | Function | Toggle terrain PBR features (roughness/AO/POM) | index.html settings checkboxes |
| `window.registerModelCollision` | L2510 | Function | Register model triangles for collision | Any module loading new collision geometry |
| `window._weaponMuzzleAnchor` | L3329 | THREE.Object3D | Muzzle point on weapon viewmodel | CombatFX (muzzle flash placement) |
| `window.__tribesBloom` | L3531 | UnrealBloomPass | Bloom pass reference | Debug, external tweaking |
| `window.__tribesComposer` | L3532 | EffectComposer | Composer reference | Debug, external tweaking |
| `window._tribesAimPoint3P` | L4212 | Object {x,y,z} | World-space aim point under crosshair | WASM (_setLocalAimPoint3P), C++ aim convergence |
| `window._tribesCamDist` | L4134 | Number | Current 3P camera distance (lerped) | syncCamera internal (should be module-scope) |
| `window._tribesCamHeight` | L4135 | Number | Current 3P camera height offset | syncCamera internal (should be module-scope) |
| `window.__nightAmbient` | L597 | THREE.AmbientLight | Night ambient light reference | DayNight._apply() |
| `window.__generatorPositions` | L4799 | Array<{x,y,z}> | Generator world positions | Audio system (proximity hum) |
| `window.__camX` | L4815 | Number | Camera X position | Audio system (proximity) |
| `window.__camY` | L4816 | Number | Camera Y position | Audio system (proximity) |
| `window.__camZ` | L4817 | Number | Camera Z position | Audio system (proximity) |
| `window._rapierGrounded` | L5284 | Boolean | Whether Rapier reports player grounded | renderer_characters.js, WASM (_setRapierGrounded) |
| `window.__tribesLoadMap` | L5501 | Function | Load a .tribes-map JSON document | Multiplayer map system |

| Global | Read at | Purpose | Written by |
|--------|---------|---------|------------|

| `window.ST` | L113 | Settings store (graphicsQuality, PBR flags) | settings.js |
| `window.Module` | throughout | Emscripten WASM module | Emscripten loader |

| `_tick()` | L5274 | Advance game simulation one frame |

| `_setRapierGrounded(0/1)` | L5286 | Signal Rapier grounding to WASM |
| `_appendInteriorMeshTris(n,ptr,...)` | L2499 | Register collision triangles |

## Player State Stride Layout (Magic Numbers)

| Offset | Field | Used at |
|--------|-------|---------|
| 0 | X position | L3775, L4082 |
| 1 | Y position | L3775, L4082 |
| 2 | Z position | L3775, L4082 |
| 3 | Pitch (radians) | L4083, L3803 |
| 4 | Yaw (radians) | L4084, L3778 |
| 6 | Velocity X | L3870, L3873 |
| 8 | Velocity Z | L3870, L3873 |
| 11 | Team index | L3764 |
| 12 | Armor tier | L3765 |
| 13 | Alive flag (>0.5 = alive) | L3763, L4097 |
| 14 | Jetting flag | L3867, L5168 |
| 15 | Skiing flag | L3069, L4622 |
| 18 | Visible flag (>0.5 = visible) | L3762 |
| 20 | Spawn protection | L3782 |

## Known Hazards

1. **HEAPF32 detachment** — WASM memory growth invalidates all typed array views. **Current status: NON-ISSUE.** Build uses fixed memory (`-sALLOW_MEMORY_GROWTH` is NOT set). `_emscripten_resize_heap` calls `abortOnCannotGrowMemory` which aborts. HEAPF32 views are created once in `updateMemoryViews()` (tribes.js L613) and never need refreshing. A `HEAPF32.buffer !== wasmMemory.buffer` assertion in the render loop (renderer.js) catches any future misconfiguration immediately. **If this invariant ever changes** (e.g., enabling memory growth for larger maps), every `new Float32Array(Module.HEAPF32.buffer, ...)` call must be replaced with a fresh view creation each frame.
2. **HDRI/DayNight race** — Both write `toneMappingExposure` and `environmentIntensity` with different values.
3. **Night ambient color typo** — `0x3040608` (7 hex digits) should be `0x304060`.
4. **Remote players disabled** — Line 3792 hides all non-local players unconditionally.
5. **2-team limit** — TEAM_COLORS[3], flags[2], flagStateByTeam[2] hardcode a 2-team game.


---

## Phase 2 Additions

### tribes.js — Emscripten WASM Bootstrap (NOT hand-written)

**Classification:** Auto-generated Emscripten glue code. 6,868 lines, zero hand-written game logic.

**Memory Model:**
- Memory growth DISABLED (`_emscripten_resize_heap` → `abortOnCannotGrowMemory` → abort)
- HEAPF32 buffer detachment CANNOT happen under current build
- OOM = hard crash with no graceful degradation
- `updateMemoryViews()` (L613) recreates all typed arrays from `wasmMemory.buffer` — called on init only

**ASM_CONSTS — JS callbacks from C++ (lines 6439-6457):**
| Callback | Purpose | Params |
|---|---|---|
| `window.sbRow` | Scoreboard row | idx, team, score, kills, deaths, hasFlag, role, name |
| `window.sbFinish` | Scoreboard complete | rs, bs, matchState, timeRemain, mvpName |
| `window.playSoundUI` | UI sound effect | soundId |
| `window.playSoundAt` | Positional audio | soundId, x, y, z |
| `window.onMatchEnd` | Match end | winner, rs, bs |
| `window.onDamageSource` | Damage direction | srcX, srcZ |
| `window.onHitConfirm` | Hit confirmation | amount |
| `window.updateHUD` | HUD update | hp, en, ammo, maxAmmo, wpn, speed10, skiing, carrying, px, pz, yaw1000, rs, bs, armor |
| `window.updateMatchHUD` | Match state | matchState, timeRemain, respawnTimer10, spawnProtRemain10 |
| `window.updateAudio` | Audio state | jetting, onGround, speed10, health1000, skiing |

**WASM Export Surface (lines 6460-6520):**
- Settings: `_setSettings(1)`, `_setGameSettings(5)`
- Loadout: `_applyLoadout(3)`
- State queries: `_getPlayerState{Ptr,Count,Stride}`, `_getProjectileState{...}`, `_getParticleState{...}`, `_getFlagState{...}`, `_getBuildingState{...}`
- Heightmap: `_getHeightmap{Ptr,Count,Size,WorldScale}`
- Camera/Match: `_getCameraFov`, `_getMatchState`, `_isReady`, `_getThirdPerson`
- Player info: `_getPlayerSkiing`, `_getPlayerSpeed`, `_getPlayerSlopeDeg`, `_getLocalPlayerIdx`
- Interior: `_appendInteriorShapeAABBs(2)`, `_appendInteriorMeshTris(8)`
- Control: `_setLocalAimPoint3P(3)`, `_setRenderMode(1)`, `_tick(0)`
- Network: `_setLocalPlayerNetCorrection(5)`, `_setMapBuildings(2)`
- Memory: `_malloc`, `_free`

**Missing exports for 4-tribe support:** `_getTeamCount`, `_getTeamInfo`, `_setPhaseState`

### renderer_rapier.js — Physics Facade

**Classification:** Hand-written Rapier 3D wrapper. 456 lines. IIFE pattern, exposes `window.RapierPhysics`.

**Architecture:**
- Dual-physics: WASM tick() moves player → Rapier corrects penetrations → writes back to WASM
- Zero-gravity Rapier world (WASM handles all movement physics)
- Kinematic player capsule (0.6 radius, 0.3 halfH = medium armor)
- Character controller with autostep (0.4m), snap-to-ground (0.2m), max slope (55°)

**Collider Types:**
| Type | Source | Count (Raindance) |
|---|---|---|
| Terrain heightfield | JS heightmap data (copied) | 1 |
| Building AABBs | WASM building array | ~40 cuboids |
| Interior trimeshes | Three.js geometry traversal | ~100+ meshes |

**Critical Issues:**
- world.step() called every frame with zero dynamic bodies (waste)
- No collider cleanup/removal (blocks building destruction, phase transitions)
- Only local player gets collision (no remote players)
- Fixed capsule size (no armor-type adjustment)
- Velocity correction logic (ratio damping) produces dead stops instead of wall sliding

**Dependency Map:**
```
renderer_rapier.js
├── IMPORTS: ./vendor/rapier/rapier.mjs (dynamic import)
├── READS: Module._getBuildingPtr/Count/Stride, Module.HEAPF32.buffer
├── WRITES: window.RapierPhysics (API facade)
└── CALLED BY: renderer.js (initRapierPhysics, createTerrainCollider, createBuildingColliders, stepPlayerCollision)
```

**Recommendation:** Refactor from character controller to collision oracle (shape casts). WASM keeps full movement authority. Rapier provides yes/no collision queries only.


---

## Phase 3 Additions

### renderer_characters.js — Character Model System

**Classification:** ES module. 294 lines. Loaded by renderer.js via `import { init, sync, isLoaded } from './renderer_characters.js?v=149'`.

**Architecture:**
- Loads single GLB model (crimson_sentinel_rigged.glb), clones via SkeletonUtils
- Computes foot offset from skeleton at load time (play idle, find lowest bone)
- Strips Hips root-motion tracks from all animations
- Animation state machine: idle → run → ski → jet → death → fire_rifle

**Dependency Map:**
```
renderer_characters.js
├── IMPORTS: three, GLTFLoader, SkeletonUtils
├── READS: window._rapierGrounded (Boolean), window._sampleTerrainH (Function), Module._getThirdPerson()
├── WRITES: nothing (no window.* exports)
├── RECEIVES: playerView (WASM HEAPF32 typed array), playerStride, localIdx, playerMeshes
└── CALLED BY: renderer.js (Characters.init(scene), Characters.sync(...))
```

**Critical Issues:**
- `_chars` array hardcoded to 16 — game needs 64 (crashes with out-of-range localIdx)
- Only renders LOCAL player in 3P — remote players completely unsupported
- `window._rapierGrounded` is a single global Boolean, not per-player
- Magic number offsets into playerView (13=alive, 18=visible, 14=jetting, 15=skiing, etc.) — no shared constants
- ~80 lines dead code: `_modelScale`, `_demo`/`_spawnDemo`/`_updateDemo`, null flame/ski vars
- No dispose/cleanup — leaked GPU resources when instances hidden

**Recommendation:** KEEP module (correct separation of concern), refactor for 64-player support with shared playerView layout constants.

### renderer_polish.js — "Visual Polish" Grab-bag

**Classification:** ES module. 1,146 lines. Loaded by renderer.js via `import { installPolish } from './renderer_polish.js'`.

**Architecture:**
- Single `installPolish(ctx)` entry point receives scene/camera/renderer/lights
- 18 safeInit'd subsystems, each independently failable
- Returns API object: tick(), onDamage(), onShoot(), onNearMiss(), onJetBoost(), onFlagEvent(), onSpawn(), onDeath()
- URL flags: ?polish=off, ?fx=low|mid|high, ?detail=high

**Contains 5+ unrelated systems:**
1. Weather FX: lightning bolts, thunder (WebAudio), wet ground
2. Combat feedback: camera shake, damage vignette, FOV punch, shockwave rings
3. Building detail: turret coils, missile clusters, sensor dishes, railings, tower windows, station icons, chimney smoke
4. HUD elements: compass, telemetry overlay (F3), settings panel (F2)
5. Visual atmosphere: lens flare, faction materials, decals

**Dependency Map:**
```
renderer_polish.js
├── IMPORTS: three, Lensflare, LensflareElement, DecalGeometry
├── READS: window.ST (settings), window.Module._getLocalPlayerIdx(), window.playSoundUI(),
│          window.__tribesApplyQuality(), _ctx.{scene,camera,renderer,composer,sunLight,hemiLight,terrainMesh,playerView,playerStride}
├── WRITES: nothing to window.* (communicates via _ctx reference and DOM)
├── DOM ELEMENTS: r327-lightning-flash, r327-damage-vignette, r327-flag-flash,
│                 r327-telemetry, r327-hud-ring, r327-settings-btn, r327-settings-panel
└── CALLED BY: renderer.js (polish.tick(), polish.onDamage(), etc.)
              renderer.js also calls exported: registerGeneratorChimney, enhanceTurret, enhanceSensor,
              addBridgeRailings, addTowerWindows, addStationIcon, getFactionPalette, spawnShockwave, placeDecal
```

**Critical Issues:**
- `addBridgeRailings()` references undefined `scene` instead of `_ctx.scene` — CRASH
- Telemetry reads velocity from wrong playerView offsets (o+4,5,6 vs actual o+6,?,o+8)
- Only 2 faction palettes ("inferno"/"storm") — game design needs 4 tribes
- 256 decals = 256 draw calls with 256 individual materials (should be instanced)
- ~60 lines dead code: _quality, _clock, _heatShimmer, _matchStartT, rain stubs, flag sting

**Recommendation:** KILL the file. Decompose into proper homes:
- Lightning/thunder/wet ground → `renderer_weather.js`
- Shake/vignette/FOV/shockwave → merge into `renderer_combat_fx.js`
- Decals → `renderer_decals.js`
- Building detail → absorb into `renderer_buildings.js`
- Faction palettes → absorb into `renderer_palette.js`
- Telemetry → absorb into `renderer_debug_panel.js`
- Compass/settings → HUD module

### Networking Stack (network.js + wire.js + prediction.js)

**Classification:** ES modules. ~725 lines total. Entry: `network.start()`.

**Architecture:**
- network.js: WebSocket connection, JSON control messages, binary game-state dispatch, 60Hz input loop, bandwidth telemetry
- wire.js: Binary encode/decode for snapshot/delta/input with quantization (via quant.js)
- prediction.js: Client-side reconciliation with smooth position correction (200ms lerp)

**Wire Format (binary, little-endian):**
| Message | Size | Content |
|---|---|---|
| Header | 8B | type(u8), flags(u8), payloadLen(u16), tick(u32) |
| Snapshot header | 24B | playerCount(u8), projCount(u8), matchTick(u16), matchState(u8), teamScore[2](u8), reserved |
| Player | 32B | id, flags, team, armor, pos[3], rot[3], vel[3], health, energy, weapon, carryFlag, botRole, lastDmgFrom |
| Projectile | 12B | id, type, team, alive, pos[3], age |
| Flag | 8B | team, state, carrier, pos[2] (**Z lost!**) |
| Input | 20B | header + buttons, mouseDX/DY, ping, weaponSelect |

**Dependency Map:**
```
network.js
├── IMPORTS: wire.js (encode/decode), constants.js, prediction.js, voice.js
├── READS: window.__TRIBES_SERVER_URL, window.__tribesReconcile, window.__tribesApplyDelta,
│          window.__tribesHideReconnect, window.__tribesShowReconnect, window.__tribesOnSkillUpdate,
│          window.__tribesOnMatchStart, window.__tribesOnMatchEnd, window.addKillMsg
├── WRITES: window.__voiceUpdatePeer, window.__voiceRegisterUuid, window.__voiceSetPeerMuted,
│           window.__voiceIsPeerMuted, window.__voiceSetMuteAll, window.__voiceGetMuteAll,
│           window.__voiceMuteUuid, window.__voiceSetPeerMutedDirect, window.__voiceClearPeerMutes
│           (9 voice API bridge globals)
└── CALLED BY: index.html (network.start(), network.setInputProvider(), network.onMessage())

wire.js
├── IMPORTS: quant.js (quantization functions + size constants), constants.js (message types)
├── WRITES: nothing
└── CALLED BY: network.js (decodeSnapshot, decodeDelta, encodeInput)

prediction.js
├── IMPORTS: constants.js (thresholds)
├── WRITES: nothing
└── CALLED BY: network.js (prediction.setLocalNumericId, .nextTick, .recordInput, .reconcile, .applyPendingCorrection, .reset, .stats)
```

**Critical Issues:**
- `start()` not idempotent — double-call creates ghost WebSocket
- Ping = `msg.serverTs - msg.clientTs` = clock offset, NOT RTT (server gets garbage for lag comp)
- Flag posZ silently lost — hardcoded to 0 on decode (breaks CTF on 3D terrain)
- "Delta" is fake — just a re-tagged full snapshot (bandwidth blocker for 64 players)
- 2-team hardcoding: teamScore[2], flags[2], voice only opens to same-team peers
- No remote player interpolation — visual stutter at server tick rate
- No reconnection state machine — disconnect is terminal
- prediction.js records inputHistory but NEVER replays it (dead data)
- Ping interval (setInterval 2000ms) never cleared on disconnect — accumulates

**Recommendation:**
- network.js: KEEP + refactor (extract telemetry, voice bridge, match state)
- wire.js: KEEP + fix (flag posZ, expand to 4 teams, pre-allocate decode buffers)
- prediction.js: KEEP + rename to `reconciliation.js` + delete dead inputHistory

### window.* Globals Added in Phase 3

| Global | Written by | Type | Purpose | Category |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `window.__voiceUpdatePeer` | network.js | Function | Voice spatialization callback | API Facade |
| `window.__voiceRegisterUuid` | network.js | Function | Register voice peer UUID | API Facade |
| `window.__voiceSetPeerMuted` | network.js | Function | Mute specific voice peer | API Facade |
| `window.__voiceIsPeerMuted` | network.js | Function | Check peer mute state | API Facade |
| `window.__voiceSetMuteAll` | network.js | Function | Global voice mute toggle | API Facade |
| `window.__voiceGetMuteAll` | network.js | Function | Get global mute state | API Facade |
| `window.__voiceMuteUuid` | network.js | Function | Mute by UUID directly | API Facade |
| `window.__voiceSetPeerMutedDirect` | network.js | Function | Mute by numeric ID | API Facade |
| `window.__voiceClearPeerMutes` | network.js | Function | Clear all peer mutes | API Facade |

### 2-Team Hardcoding Inventory (Phase 4)

| Module | Hardcoded Element | Fix Required |
|---|---|---|
| renderer_minimap.js | TEAM_COLORS[2], FLAG_COLORS[2], flag loop `i < 2` | Expand arrays to 4, dynamic flag count |
| renderer_command_map.js | teamColors[3], flag loop `i < 2` | Expand to 4 tribes |
| renderer_palette.js | teamColor() binary, only teamRed/teamBlue | Add teamGold/teamGreen, switch on index |
| renderer_combat_fx.js | Tracer color always 0xffd070 | Per-tribe tracer color from palette |
| client/mapeditor.js | flags[2], spawns[2], point type dropdown | 4 flags, 4 spawns, 4 point types |
| client/replay.js | Player/flag colors binary, teamScore[2] | 4 colors, 4 scores |
| renderer_polish.js | 2 faction palettes ("inferno"/"storm") | 4 tribe palettes (already flagged Phase 3) |

### Self-Driven RAF Loops (Architecture Issue)

| Module | Issue | Fix |
|---|---|---|
| renderer_command_map.js | `_startSelfLoop()` runs own RAF | Remove, call update() from main loop |
| renderer_zoom.js | `_boot()` runs own RAF | Remove, call tick() from main loop |

## Phase 5 — Master Global Inventory

**Complete inventory of all 83 window.* globals is in `docs/audit-log/run-1/phase-5-integration.md` Section 2.**

### Summary by Category

| Category | Count | Examples |
|----------|-------|---------|
| API Facade | 38 | RapierPhysics, CombatFX, Minimap, CommandMap, ZoomFX, Toonify, ST, __tribesNet |
| WASM Bridge | 12 | playSoundUI, playSoundAt, updateHUD, updateMatchHUD, sbRow, sbFinish, onMatchEnd, onDamageSource, onHitConfirm, updateAudio, r3FrameTime, Module |
| Shared Data | 20 | _tribesCamDist, _tribesAimPoint3P, __nightAmbient, __generatorPositions, __camX/Y/Z, _rapierGrounded, __teamColors |
| Debug | 8 | scene, camera, renderer, _tribesDebug, __tribesPolish, __tribesBloom, __tribesComposer, DEBUG_LOGS |
| Config | 3 | __TRIBES_SERVER_URL, __qualityTier, __tribesUseThree |
| Dead | 1 | Cohesion (module flagged for kill) |

### Cross-Module Globals (highest coupling risk)

| Global | Writer | Readers | Coupling Risk |
|--------|--------|---------|--------------|
| `window.Module` | Emscripten | renderer.js, index.html, rapier, characters, polish | WASM dependency everywhere |
| `window._sampleTerrainH` | renderer.js | renderer_characters.js, any module needing ground height | Terrain coupling |
| `window._rapierGrounded` | renderer.js | renderer_characters.js, WASM via _setRapierGrounded | Physics coupling |
| `window.__voice` + 9 voice globals | client/network.js | renderer.js, index.html | Voice subsystem coupling |
| `window.ST` | client/settings.js | renderer.js, renderer_polish.js, index.html | Settings coupling |

### 2-Team Hardcoding Summary

**12 files, 28 locations.** Full inventory in Phase 5 Integration Audit Section 5.


---

## index.html — Game Bridge & UI Shell (Phase 5 Additions)

**Classification:** ~3,200 lines hand-written JavaScript (4,524 total lines including HTML/CSS). The largest single source of game logic outside renderer.js. Contains the WASM↔JS bridge, all menu/HUD UI, audio engine, settings system, chat, scoreboard, matchmaking, and the Module bootstrap.

### File Structure

| Line Range | Section | LOC | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1–649 | HTML head + CSS | ~649 | Meta tags, SEO, full CSS stylesheet, importmap |
| 650–658 | Server config | ~8 | `__TRIBES_SERVER_URL` definition (commented out) |
| 660–698 | Dev HUD chips | ~38 | Version chip, FPS chip, clock chip, PBR toggle chips |
| 699–791 | PBR chip logic | ~92 | Interactive PBR roughness/AO/POM toggle with settings sync |
| 793–920 | HUD HTML | ~127 | All gameplay HUD elements (health/energy bars, crosshair, compass, score, ski HUD, damage flash, respawn overlay, match end, tutorial, etc.) |
| 920–1512 | Menu HTML | ~592 | Main menu, team select, armor select, game setup, settings panel, help panel, report panel, profile panel, lobby browser, map selector |
| 1513–1656 | Menu JS | ~143 | Screen navigation, team/armor selection, map selection, quickStart, game settings |
| 1657–1770 | WASM HUD callbacks | ~113 | `updateHUD()`, `updateMatchHUD()`, compass update, damage flash |
| 1770–1886 | Game flow | ~116 | `startGame()`, `restartGame()`, `toMainMenu()`, event messages |
| 1887–1970 | Scoreboard | ~83 | `sbRow()`, `sbFinish()` (defined TWICE — L1901 and L1969), `renderScoreboard()` |
| 1970–2000 | Match end | ~30 | `onMatchEnd()`, map voting, replay buttons, survey |
| 2000–2310 | Social systems | ~310 | Chat (open/close/dispatch/render), emoji floats, display name, voice mute, report/block, help, GDPR export/delete |
| 2310–2630 | Profile & lobbies | ~320 | Player profile, lobby browser, quick match, custom lobby, replays, map voting |
| 2630–2780 | Combat feedback | ~150 | Damage arcs, spawn protection overlay, critical HP vignette, hit confirmation |
| 2780–3080 | Network UI | ~300 | Reconnect overlay, kill messages, inventory stations, flag status |
| 3083–3657 | Audio Engine (AE) | ~574 | Complete procedural audio system: 20 sound slots, procedural buffers, WebAudio graph, music, ambience, spatial audio, generator hum |
| 3657–3700 | WASM audio bridge | ~43 | `playSoundAt()`, `playSoundUI()`, `shaz()`, `updateAudio()` |
| 3700–4030 | Settings system (ST) | ~330 | `loadSettings()`, `saveSettings()`, keybindings, color-blind mode, crosshair customization, settings import/export |
| 4030–4080 | FPS counter + ski HUD | ~50 | `updateFPS()`, ski speed/slope display, hit tick animation |
| 4080–4520 | Module bootstrap | ~440 | WASM `onRuntimeInitialized`, dynamic imports (tiers.js, network.js, prediction.js, mapeditor.js, replay.js, moderation.js, renderer.js), match lifecycle callbacks |

### Audio Engine (AE) Interface

The audio engine is defined at L3083 as `var AE = { ... }` and exposed at L3657 as `window.AE`.

**Architecture:**
- WebAudio API with master gain node + 3 bus submixes (sfx, ui, music)
- Lazy init: `AE.init()` called on first user interaction (pointer lock)
- 20 procedural sound buffers generated at init (disc fire, explosions, jet, ski, landing, etc.)
- Real samples loaded async via `AE.loadRealSamples()` for higher-quality disc/ski/lightning/shazbot
- Spatial audio: `AE.playAt(id, x, y, z)` with distance-based gain (1/r² falloff)
- Continuous loops: jet engine, ski friction, generator hum — updated per frame via `AE.update()`

**Key methods:**
| Method | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `AE.init()` | Create AudioContext, build procedural buffers, set up buses |
| `AE.playAt(id, x, y, z)` | Play sound at world position with spatial falloff |
| `AE.playUI(id)` | Play non-spatial UI sound |
| `AE.update(jetting, onGround, speed, health, skiing)` | Per-frame continuous sound state update |
| `AE.startMusic()` | Begin background music loop |
| `AE.loadRealSamples()` | Async-load WAV/OGG samples to replace procedural buffers |
| `AE.mute()` | Toggle master mute |
| `AE.playShazbot(loud)` | Play the iconic Tribes shazbot voice line |
| `AE.setMusicVolume(v)` | Set music volume (0-1) |
| `AE.setAmbienceVolume(v)` | Set ambience volume (0-1) |

**Sound slot IDs (procedural):**
| ID | Sound | Duration |
|---|---|---|
| 0 | Disc fire (bass thump) | 0.3s |
| 1 | Explosion | 0.6s |
| 2 | Energy hit | 0.2s |
| 3 | Chain gun burst | 0.15s |
| 4 | Grenade launch | 0.25s |
| 5 | Scoreboard open | 0.1s |
| 6 | Scoreboard close | 0.1s |
| 7 | Capture sound | 0.4s |
| 8 | Impact/land | 0.15s |

### HUD Element ID Map

**Gameplay HUD (`#hud`):**
| ID | Element | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `hud` | Container div | Main HUD wrapper, hidden during menus |
| `hud-bl` | Bottom-left group | Health + energy bars |
| `hp-fill` | Health bar fill | Width% driven by WASM hp |
| `en-fill` | Energy bar fill | Width% driven by WASM energy |
| `hud-br` | Bottom-right group | Weapon info |
| `hud-wpn-icon` | Weapon icon | CSS background-image per weapon type |
| `hud-ammo` | Ammo display | "cur / max" text |
| `ammo-cur` | Current ammo span | Updated from updateHUD |
| `ammo-max` | Max ammo span | Updated from updateHUD |
| `hud-xhair` | Crosshair container | SVG crosshair overlay at screen center |
| `xhair-svg` | Crosshair SVG | 4 arm lines + center dot |
| `hud-compass` | Compass bar | CSS-driven horizontal compass strip |
| `compass-track` | Compass track | Scrolling N/S/E/W markers |
| `hud-score` | Score display | "RED 0 : 0 BLUE" |
| `hs-red` / `hs-blue` | Team scores | Red/blue score numbers |
| `hud-flag-carry` | Flag carry banner | Shown when carrying enemy flag |
| `hud-timer` | Match timer | "5:00" countdown |
| `hud-warmup` | Warmup text | Pre-match countdown message |
| `eventlog` | Event log | Kill feed / game events |
| `ski-hud` | Ski HUD group | Speed + slope display during skiing |
| `ski-badge` | "SKI" label | Visible when skiing active |
| `ski-speed-val` | Speed number | m/s value |
| `ski-slope-fill` | Slope indicator bar | Fill width = slope angle |
| `ski-slope-label` | Slope text | "FLAT" / "MILD" / "STEEP" |
| `hit-tick` | Hit marker | "+" flash on hit confirm |

**State overlays:**
| ID | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `damage-flash` | Full-screen red flash on damage |
| `ptr-lock-hint` | "CLICK TO RESUME" pointer lock prompt |
| `respawn-overlay` | Death/respawn countdown |
| `respawn-count` | Respawn seconds counter |
| `matchend` | Match end scoreboard + voting |
| `countdown` | Pre-match "3, 2, 1, GO" |
| `spawn-prot` | "INVULNERABLE 3.0s" spawn protection |
| `damage-arcs` | Directional damage indicators |
| `critical-hp-vignette` | Red vignette at low health |
| `spec-bars` | Cinematic letterbox bars (spectator) |
| `spec-label` | "SPECTATING — RESPAWNING" text |
| `toast` | Toast notification popup |
| `tutorial` | Tutorial step overlay |

**Dev/debug chips (always visible):**
| ID | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `version-chip` | Build version (e.g., "R32.221") |
| `fps-chip` | FPS counter |
| `clock-chip` | In-game time of day |
| `pbr-chip-rough` | PBR roughness toggle |
| `pbr-chip-ao` | PBR ambient occlusion toggle |
| `pbr-chip-pom` | PBR parallax mapping toggle |

### WASM Bootstrap Sequence (Module.onRuntimeInitialized)

Located at ~L4175-4520. Sequence:

1. **Import tiers.js** → `window.__tiers` (skill rating display)
2. **Import network.js** → `window.__tribesNet` (multiplayer)
3. **Register match callbacks** → `__tribesReconcile`, `__tribesOnMatchStart`, `__tribesOnMatchEnd`, `__tribesOnSkillUpdate`
4. **Import mapeditor.js** → `window.__editor` (map editor)
5. **Import replay.js** → `window.__replay` (replay viewer)
6. **Import moderation.js** → `window.__moderation` (username validation)
7. **Dynamic import renderer.js** → calls `start()` which initializes Three.js scene
8. **Start prediction frame loop** → separate RAF for client-side prediction
9. **Hide loading screen** → show menu

### Known Issues in index.html

1. **sbFinish defined twice** (L1901 and L1969) — second definition overwrites first; first 68 lines are dead code
2. **updateAudio called with 4 OR 5 params** — two ASM_CONST entries with different signatures (skiing sometimes missing)
3. **_restartGame is phantom export** — called with `if(Module._restartGame)` guard but not in WASM export table
4. **~2,000 lines partially audited** — HUD, audio engine, menus, matchmaking sections need deeper review
5. **2-team hardcoding** — teamScore[2], flags[2], team select UI only has 2 options
